changes.value:
## What

Create a parameterized test harness that exercises every field editor across every keymap mode and every exit path. One test loop, not duplicated test blocks.

### Files to create
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî the matrix test

### Approach
1. Define a test matrix: `editors √ó keymapModes √ó exitPaths`
   - Editors: `markdown`, `number`, `select`, `date`, `color-palette`, `multi-select`
   - Keymap modes: `cua`, `vim`, `emacs`
   - Exit paths: `blur`, `Enter`, `Escape`
2. For each combination, define expected behavior:
   - `blur` ‚Üí always saves
   - `Enter` ‚Üí always saves (or submits)
   - `Escape` ‚Üí vim saves, CUA/emacs discards
3. Each test renders the editor with mocked `useFieldUpdate`, simulates the exit path, asserts whether `updateField` was called
4. Use `describe.each` or `it.each` to drive the matrix
5. Delete `field-placeholder.test.tsx` ‚Äî its coverage is subsumed by this

### Key design decisions
- Each editor needs a small adapter: how to set its value (CM6 dispatch vs input.value), how to trigger exit (keyDown vs blur)
- Define these as a `Record<editorName, { render, setValue, getExitTarget }>` map
- The test loop is generic ‚Äî editor-specific setup is in the adapter

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Single test file covers all editor √ó keymap √ó exit combinations
- [ ] No duplicated test logic between editors
- [ ] Test failures clearly identify which editor/keymap/exit failed
- [ ] Existing `field-placeholder.test.tsx` deleted (replaced by this)

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` ‚Äî all pass after editor cards are done
- [ ] Temporarily expect failures for editors not yet migrated ‚Äî that's the red in TDD
Data-driven field editor test harness ‚Äî all editors √ó all keymaps √ó all exit paths

    - Exit paths: `blur`, `Enter`, `Escape`

-5. Delete `field-placeholder.test.tsx` ‚Äî its coverage is subsumed by this
+3. Mock `useFieldUpdate` ‚Äî assert `updateField` called with correct entity/field/value
+4. Per-editor adapter: `{ render, setValue, getExitTarget }` ‚Äî editor-specific setup

-- The test loop is generic ‚Äî editor-specific setup is in the adapter
